tasks.instruction: Uzupelnij tabelke, dobierajac okreslenia (A-L) odpowiadajace danej kategorii. Trzy okreslenia podano dodatkowo i nie pasuja one do zadnej kategorii.

options.text: The Tower of London is a historic castle in this city
The Harbour Bridge is a landmark steel arch bridge in this city
Buckingham Palace is the residence of the monarch in this city
The Sagrada Familia is an unfinished basilica in this city
The Statue of Liberty stands on an island near this city
Broadway is the world-famous theatre district in this city
Bondi Beach is one of the most famous beaches in this city
Central Park is a large public park in the heart of this city
The Golden Gate Bridge is an iconic landmark of this city
The Colosseum is an ancient amphitheatre in this city
The Opera House with sail-shaped roofs stands in this city
The Tube is the name of the underground railway in this city
